sglang.title: Optimize MiMo-V2-Flash by flashinfer fused allreduce
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to make MiMo-V2-Flash model leverage FlashInfer fused_allreduce to fuse allreduce+rmsnorm+residual_add.
The E2E TTFT reduce 5.1%.
➜  sglang git:(main) python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-V2-Flash --tp-size 4 --port 30000 --attention-backend triton --disable

sglang.title: vlm: Refactor engine vlm params and support precessor output as input
sglang.author: minleminzui
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR refactors how the offline Engine handles multimodal / VLM inputs and exposes a consistent image_data API across models.

Motivation
Previously, each VLM had its own ad-hoc way to pass images (raw pixel values, custom dicts, etc.), and multi-image requests could easily break the engin

sglang.title: [VLM] Support ViT Piecewise CUDA Graph for Qwen3-VL
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to enable ViT Piecewise CUDA Graph for Qwen3-VL.
Building logic upon ViTCudaGraphRunner to support both Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL.
TP>1 is supported.
Benchmark show 8xH20 Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct TP=4
TTFT 1384.53ms --> 1120.68ms
Meanwhile fixed a bug that torch-symm-mem is not enab

For 8 gpu models, we create a unified testing framework that tests both performance and accuracy tests. Each model defines the configs that it wants to be tested on and specify params for the tests: For accuracy tests, it can define the eval dataset to be used as well as the accuracy thre

sglang.title: [CI] Fix /rerun-stage command by using requests for workflow dispatch
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix /rerun-stage command which was silently failing
Rename stage-b-test-2-gpu to stage-b-test-large-2-gpu for naming consistency

Problem
PyGithub's create_dispatch method checks for HTTP 204 status code only:
return status == 204
However, GitHub's workflow dispatch API now returns HTTP 200

sglang.title: [model-gateway]: Tool parser for glm47
sglang.author: UbeCc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This pr implements tool parser for GLM-4.7.
GLM-4.7 removes '\n' in template from GLM-4.6.
before (GLM-4.6)
<tool_call>{name}\n<arg_key>{key}</arg_key>\n<arg_value>{value}</arg_value>\n</tool_call>

after (GLM-4.7)
<tool_call>{name}<arg_key>{key}</arg_key><arg_value>{value}</arg_value></t

sglang.title: [FusedMoE] Fix fused w13 tp sharded weight loading
sglang.author: yinghai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For fused w13 weights [w1; w3], we need to shard w1 and w3 independently, then concatenate them back to maintain the
[w1_shard; w3_shard] structure per TP rank, because our gelu_and_mul kernel is assuming this kind of layout:

  
    
      sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/elementwise.py

sglang.title: [EAGLE] Fix slow Triton compilation in EAGLE KV cache copy by chunking large num_locs_upper
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix slow Triton kernel compilation when using EAGLE speculative decoding with large num_locs_upper values (e.g., 8192). The copy_all_layer_kv_cache_tiled kernel uses num_locs_upper as a tl.constexpr, causing ptxas to hang on large specializations.
Modifications

Fixed num_locs_upper to a

sglang.author: ocss884

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Read truncate_prompt_tokens from pooling_params in AsyncLLM.encode()
vllm.author: jeffreywang88
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, AsyncLLM.encode() uses the separate truncate_prompt_tokens parameter and ignores the value in pooling_params.truncate_prompt_tokens. This confuses users who set truncate_prompt_tokens in PoolingParams as it has no effect on prompt truncation. Moreover, this is inconsistent with ge

Purpose
#28152
#28745
Fix dimension mismatch error in LongCat Flash MoE model when using zero experts. The issue occurred when router_logits (including zero experts) and e_score_correction_bias (only real experts) had different dimensions during expert selection.

pytest tests/models/test_r
